input: Run pipeline governance on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected pipeline governance output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the pipeline governance workflow

input: Apply pipeline governance to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive pipeline governance analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to pipeline governance

input: Run pipeline governance but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply pipeline governance but requirements contradict each other
